input_text: Baby bears can not eat berries. The handle of Mary's suitcase broke. Elephant's head is green. Earth contains Europe. Sheep are afraid of mice. A chocolate cake fell. A boy saw a girl. John is above a box. Mr Dursley is a catholic. Eve failed to finish the report. Mike or Mickey are not female. A tall and quiet man entered. Unexpectedly, the door opened. He was nice. Sandra travelled to the office. The bike is small. Penguins live in water. The teacher showed the students the map. Who was nice?
